About

An institution advancing
AI in Africa.

TRI AI is a non-governmental organisation registered as Artificial Intelligence Teaching Research and Innovation for Africa Ltd/Gte. Through three divisions, the organisation advances AI education, research, and innovation across Africa.

Our story

TRI AI was founded to address the growing need for accessible and locally relevant AI education in Africa. What began as a community initiative has evolved into a structured institution supporting learning, research, and innovation.

Through programmes like TRI AI Saturdays Lagos and initiatives like the Sauti Project, TRI AI continues to build a strong ecosystem where learners, researchers, and collaborators can grow and contribute meaningfully.

Mission

To democratise artificial intelligence by building African AI communities that enable learning, research, and the development of AI solutions for local and global impact.

Vision

To be at the forefront of artificial intelligence research and development in Africa and for Africa.

02 — What we stand for

Our values.

01

Innovation

We embrace new ideas and continuously explore ways to advance AI knowledge.

02

Accessibility

We believe AI education should be open and available to everyone.

03

Community

We grow through shared learning and collective progress.

04

Collaboration

We partner with organisations and individuals to amplify impact.

05

Empowerment

We equip individuals with the tools to build and lead.

03 — Leadership

A growing network.

Educators, researchers, and volunteers committed to advancing AI across Africa.
